options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: starting_character
options.description: Determines which character you start the game with.

options.name: shuffle_refract_characters
options.description: Shuffles the refract variants of all characters into the itempool.

options.name: starting_character_is_refract
options.description:
Makes starting character use their refract variant.
Characters without a refract skill won't be affected.

options.name: excluded_characters
options.description: Prevent these characters and their related locations from being shuffled into the multiworld.

options.name: total_characters
options.description:
Cut out a percentage of playable characters from the pool at random, useful for shorter Archipelago sessions.
100 will include all characters, 0 will only add your starting character.

options.name: hub_shop_restock_count
options.description:
The amount of restocks Chester's camp shop will contain.
Each restock adds 5 extra locations to your world.

options.name: progression_type
options.description:
How to handle game progression.
Progressive Dungeons: adds a hard cap on how far the player can progress based on the amount of progressive dungeon items they posess.
None: Progression logic is only based on the amount of relics you've collected, there's no hard cap on how far you can get in a run.

options.name: shuffle_relics
options.description: Shuffles all relics into the itempool.

options.name: relic_leniency
options.description:
Multiplier that affects how strict relic logic will be.
If less than 10, more relics will be considered required to progress to the next dungeon.
The opposite holds true if set to more than 10.

options.name: early_meal_ticket
options.description: Places the meal ticket in an early sphere to prevent characters with low health from getting stuck.

options.name: shuffle_hats
options.description: Shuffles all hats into the itempool.

options.name: hat_expiration_action
options.description:
When any recieved hat effects wear off.
New hat: Current hat gets removed when a new hat is sent
End run: Current hat gets removed when dying or beating the next adventure run.

options.name: hat_stack_amount
options.description: The maximum amount of hats a player is able to have at a time.

options.name: excluded_hats
options.description: Prevent these hats from being shuffled into the multiworld.

options.name: filler_weights
options.description:
Determines how often each filler item appears in the itempool.
Items like hats can be added to this list if you want them to act like a standard filler item.

options.name: randomize_level_order
options.description:
Shuffles around level themes, does not have an effect on logic.
Different from the "shuffle all" in-game option as the level shuffle will be unique to each Archipelago world.

options.name: randomize_bosses
options.description: Shuffles boss locations around on the adventure mode map.

options.name: modded_levels
options.description:
Add level ids for any modded levels you may want to include in the level shuffle.
This doesn't need to be set if randomize level order is disabled.

options.name: dungeon_shop_hints
options.description:
Toggles behavior of dungeon shops when selling archipelago items.
On: Dungeon shops will show which item they're selling before purchase but will cost a variable amount of gems.
Off: Dungeon shops won't show which item they're selling but the item can be picked up for free.

options.name: staring_relic_slot_amount
options.description:
How many "Starting Relic Slot" items get shuffled into the itempool.
Each slot adds a randomized relic at the start of an adventure run. Helps with speeding up the late game a bit.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
